steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The first sentence establishes a confirmed use of quipus for recording countable information.

The second sentence introduces a speculative possibility that they may have also used quipus differently—to record complex information.

The blank needs a transition that signals this move from established fact to a new, possible additional use.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: ”In addition” correctly marks the introduction of a new, speculative use being added to the already-confirmed one. The others impose false logical relationships that don't match the shift from established fact to speculative addition. That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
